business_question: How has monthly sales performance changed compared to the previous month?
business_context: Retail leadership monitors growth trends to identify emerging opportunities and risks.
sql_answer:
WITH monthly_sales AS (
    SELECT
        d.YEAR,
        d.MONTH,
        SUM(s.NET_UNITS_SOLD) AS SALES
    FROM FACT_SALES s
    JOIN DIM_DATE d
        ON s.DATE_KEY = d.DATE_KEY
    GROUP BY d.YEAR, d.MONTH
)
SELECT
    YEAR,
    MONTH,
    SALES,
    LAG(SALES) OVER (
        ORDER BY YEAR, MONTH
    ) AS PREVIOUS_MONTH_SALES,
    ROUND(
        (SALES -
         LAG(SALES) OVER (ORDER BY YEAR, MONTH))
         * 100.0 /
         NULLIF(
            LAG(SALES) OVER (ORDER BY YEAR, MONTH),
            0
         ),
         2
    ) AS MOM_GROWTH_PCT
FROM monthly_sales
ORDER BY YEAR, MONTH;
